<question>

6. If b is willow, then b is north.
7. If a is west and a is teal, then b is ivory.
8. If b is ivory, then b is north.
9. If a is east and a is teal, then b is violet.
10. If b is violet, then b is north.
Which state applies to b?
</question>

b = b
</constants>

Bx: x is ivory

Fa
